items.title: China Unicom, Huawei release 5G-Advanced 100 MHz GigaUplink network
items.summary: China Unicom Beijing and Huawei launched the world's largest 5G-A GigaUplink commercial network.

items.title: SpaceX seeks tweaks in upper C-band auction rules
items.summary: SpaceX is pressing for more flexibility as the FCC tees up the next big spectrum auction.

items.title: Silo Communications expands fiber connectivity in rural Illinois with Adtran
items.summary: As demand for reliable broadband continues to grow across communities, Silo Communications is building on its wireless heritage with a scalable fiber network designed to support higher speeds, stronger service reliability and future expansion.

items.title: NTIA announces funding opp for AI-native wireless network innovation
items.summary: NTIA is making up to $53 million available to accelerate the development, testing, and commercialization, of secure, American-led AI‑enabled Radio Access Network (RAN) architecture.

items.title: EchoStar off hook for operating own mobile network
items.summary: EchoStar is officially off the hook for building and running its own mobile network as Dish Wireless heads back to bankruptcy court this week.

items.title: AT&T takes multi-prong approach to get out of California landline phone business
items.summary: One consumer advocacy group says AT&T has not provided any data or proof that its alternative telephone technology works in California’s most remote areas.

items.title: Fiber Demand, BEAD and AI Are Reshaping Broadband Deployment Planning
items.summary: AI growth and BEAD deployments are transforming fiber demand. Learn why proactive planning and early supplier partnerships are critical for success.

items.title: Cohere announces support for AI-RAN powered E3 interface
items.summary: Cohere says this will enable distributed applications (dApps), such as Cohere’s USM, to integrate more effectively with existing and new base stations, delivering improved spectral efficiency and network capacity.

items.title: e& UAE and Core42 team to launch sovereign AI infrastructure
items.summary: The telco is teaming up with AI infrastructure provider Core42 to offer sovereign cloud services to enterprises in the UAE.

items.title: Cirion turns to agentic AI to optimize its Latin America network
items.summary: Cirion put Grokstream's Grok AIOps into production across 105,000 km of Latin American fiber, cutting alarm noise up to 92% and flagging faults early.

items.title: AT&T, Palo Alto Networks launch quantum-resilient SASE fabric
items.summary: Palo Alto Networks and AT&T Business have launched Secure Connectivity solutions for Business Customers.

items.title: Comcast, AT&T duke it out with utilities over pole attachments
items.summary: The FCC has instituted new rules and regulations to expedite pole attachment issues for broadband deployers. But utilities aren't going along.
